users.selectAll: SELECT id, name, username FROM public.users ORDER BY name
users.insert: INSERT INTO public.users (id, name, username, password_hash, role) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
users.update: UPDATE public.users SET name = $1, username = $2, password_hash = $3, role = $4 WHERE id = $5

siteContent.selectBySection: SELECT key, value FROM public.site_content WHERE section = $1
siteContent.upsert: INSERT INTO public.site_content (id, section, key, value) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (section, key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value
siteContent.delete: DELETE FROM public.site_content WHERE section = $1 AND key = $2

projects.selectAll: SELECT * FROM public.projects ORDER BY title
projects.insert: INSERT INTO public.projects (id, title, description, cover_image, background_image, primary_color, secondary_color, blocks) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
projects.update: UPDATE public.projects SET title = $1, description = $2, cover_image = $3, background_image = $4, primary_color = $5, secondary_color = $6, blocks = $7 WHERE id = $8
